--gpt-oss-120b-default                  use gpt-oss-120b (note: can download weights from the internet)
--vision-gemma-4b-default               use Gemma 3 4B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)
--vision-gemma-12b-default              use Gemma 3 12B QAT (note: can download weights from the internet)
--spec-default                          enable default speculative decoding config

  /read <file>        add a text file
  /glob <pattern>     add text files using globbing pattern


> Write a short paragraph about speculative decoding.

Speculative decoding is an advanced inference technique designed to significantly accelerate large language models by generating multiple candidate tokens in parallel before verifying them against the model's actual predictions. Instead of generating tokens one by one, the system uses a smaller, faster "speculative model" to propose a sequence of tokens, which are then validated in batches by the larger, more accurate "target model." If the speculative tokens are correct, the target model accepts them immediately, effectively skipping the intermediate generation steps; if any token is incorrect, the process backtracks and regenerates from that point. This approach leverages the speed of smaller models to reduce the overall latency of text generation, making high-quality reasoning and long-context responses more efficient and responsive.
